cards.title: The Messenger
cards.meaning: A signal is in transit. Something you have been waiting to hear is already on its way. Stay receptive — the channel is open.

cards.title: The Mirror
cards.phrase: What you see is what is seeing.
cards.meaning: The situation reflects something interior. Look past the surface event to what it is showing you about yourself.

cards.title: The Threshold
cards.meaning: A crossing is underway. Hesitation now costs more than it saves. The door is open; trust your original impulse.

cards.title: The Spread
cards.meaning: A full opening. All positions are in play.
